title: Greenidge Generation Reports Q1 2025 Earnings - Mining Capacity Expansion and Debt Reduction
text: Greenidge Generation Q1 2025 Earnings Report. Financial Performance: Greenidge reported Q1 2025 revenue of $19.2 million with a net operating loss of $5.6 million. The company generated $0.4 million in EBITDA and $1.0 million in adjusted EBITDA while producing 112 BTC during the quarter. Revenue breakdown included Cryptocurrency mining $4.2 million, Datacenter hosting $5.8 million, Power and capacity $9.2 million. Mining Capacity Expansion: The company significantly expanded its operational footprint currently operating 119MW of active capacity across New York Mississippi and North Dakota facilities. Greenidge projects reaching 161.5MW total near-term mining capacity. This includes 2.5MW of planned additions expected in Q2-Q3 2025 and at least 40MW by Q2 2026 from a newly acquired Mississippi site providing access to 40 MW of additional low-cost power by July 2026. Debt Reduction Progress: Greenidge achieved meaningful deleveraging reducing debt to $60.2 million through privately negotiated exchanges representing a 16.6% reduction of its original $72.2 million senior unsecured debt obligation. Additional Developments: The company appointed two independent directors and progressed toward closing its South Carolina property sale while maintaining no current plans to utilize its equity line of credit.
